name: Ragdoll Escape: Endless Fall
description: Are you ready for an adrenaline-fueled, physics-based descent? In Ragdoll Escape: Endless Fall, you control a clumsy ragdoll character falling through a dangerous neon-lit vertical city. Your mission is simple but extremely challenging: survive the endless drop by dodging deadly obstacles, sharp red spikes, and moving metallic saws! As you fall faster, you must use your quick reflexes to maneuver between multiple platforms. Every collision triggers chaotic ragdoll physics, turning your escape into a bouncy, unpredictable ride. Test your skills, beat your high score, and see how long you can survive the ultimate endless fall!
instructions: PC Use Left and Right Arrow Keys or A and D to maneuver the ragdoll character horizontally and dodge obstacles MOBILE Touch and hold the left right on-screen buttons to steer the character
